    <item>
      <title>Can DPOY Victor Wembanyama become the greatest defender in NBA history?</title>
      <description>San Antonio Spurs superstar Victor Wembanyama recently became the first unanimous and youngest winner of the NBA Defensive Player of the Year award. </description>

    <item>
      <title>What factors will decide the Lakers-Rockets playoff series?</title>
      <description>When the Los Angeles Lakers' two leading scorers, Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves, went down against the Oklahoma City Thunder on April 2, many speculated their playoff hopes were diminished and that a short series was inevitable. Instead, they're up 2-0 on the Rockets. What will determine how the rest of the series plays out?</description>
      <pubDate>23 Apr 2026 14:10:39 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/what_factors_will_decide_the_lakers_rockets_playoff_series/s1_13132_43761294</link>

        <media:credit> Jayne Kamin-Oncea-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Houston Rockets forward Kevin Durant. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Los Angeles Lakers</category>
      <category>Houston Rockets</category>
    </item>

    <item>
      <title>Patrick Ewing explains why he would still dominate modern NBA era</title>
      <description>The 1990s basketball era gets remembered for one thing above all else: physicality. Games were slower, grittier and built around power in the paint. That reputation created a narrative that dominant big men from that decade wouldn't survive in today's game. Patrick Ewing doesn't buy it.</description>
      <pubDate>22 Apr 2026 17:52:14 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/patrick_ewing_explains_why_he_would_still_dominate_modern_nba_era/s1_13132_43758689</link>
      <guid>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/patrick_ewing_explains_why_he_would_still_dominate_modern_nba_era/s1_13132_43758689</guid>
      <author>Yagya Bhargava, Yardbarker</author>
      <media:content url="http://www.yardbarker.com/media/0/c/0cd6cdf58a8f5d9d6fbf7db59b90db59ac4ac99c/thumb_16x9/patrick-ewing-explains-he-would-still-dominate.jpg">
        <media:credit> Wendell Cruz-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Former NBA center Patrick Ewing. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>New York Knicks</category>
      <category>Georgetown Hoyas</category>
      <category>Patrick Ewing</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Steve Kerr drops a major hint about his next job</title>
      <description>Steve Kerr may be following the lead of former Golden State Warriors colleague Bob Myers. </description>
